data.description: Trump isn't yet ready to say what the US will do if the missing crew member is harmed - The Independent

data.title: Anika Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: Anika Therapeutics, Inc., a prominent player in osteoarthritis pain management and regenerative solutions, based in Bedford, Mass., shared news of granting 3,138 restricted stock units (RSUs) on April 1, 2026, to a newly hired non-executive employee. The grant, part of the 2021 Inducement Plan, was approved by the compensation committee of the board of directors under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) to entice the grantee to join the company.

data.title: Jena Acquisition Corporation II Announces Non-Compliance with Section 802.01B of the NYSE Listed Company Manual which Requires the Company to Maintain a Minimum of 300 Public Stockholders
data.description: A company based in Las Vegas, Nevada, known as Jena Acquisition Corporation II, disclosed on April 3, 2026, that it had been notified by the staff of NYSE Regulation regarding its non-compliance with Section 802.01B of the NYSE Listed Company Manual. The regulation necessitates the company to uphold a minimum of 300 public stockholders continuously. The notice was dated April 1, 2026.
Matinas BioPharma Receives Notice of Non-Compliance with NYSE American Continued Listing Standards

data.title: Sekisui Specialty Chemicals Announces Global Price Increase
data.description: Today, Sekisui Specialty Chemicals revealed their decision to raise prices on Selvol® Polyvinyl Alcohol, Selvol Ultiloc®, Selvol Ultalux®, and Selvol Premiol® products in North America. The upcoming price increases are detailed in the provided table.

data.title: Lucid Announces Q1 Production & Deliveries, Sets Date for First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Lucid Group, Inc., based in Newark, California, released today its production and delivery figures for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026. Renowned for manufacturing cutting-edge software-defined vehicles and technologies, Lucid Group reported the production of [insert number] units during this quarter. Additionally, the company successfully delivered [insert number] units to customers.

data.title: New FIFA partnership with ADI Predictstreet for World Cup predictions; ADI Chain token reaches record high on Friday.
data.description: The upcoming FIFA World Cup will introduce a forecast market system developed on ADI Chain, with the platform's cryptocurrency reaching a record peak on Friday.

data.title: Cambodian officials plan to enact law imposing harsh prison sentences on crypto scammers, awaiting approval by the king.
data.description: A draft bill with provisions aimed at addressing scam centers in Cambodia is currently awaiting the king's signature to become law. The bill signifies a major policy shift for Cambodian officials, with important implications for combating fraudulent activities.

data.title: Fixed Summit Unveils 2026 Lineup of Speakers & Events
data.description: An event called Fixed Summit, tailored for multifamily maintenance and facilities professionals, has revealed enhanced programming for its 2026 edition. Set to take place from April 27 to April 29 at the Hyatt Regency Lost Pines Resort near Austin, the event will include OSHA-certified safety training, live equipment demonstrations, peer-led breakout sessions, and the comeback of the FXD Built Different challenge. The event aims to cater to technicians, supervisors, directors, and operations leaders involved in maintaining properties.

data.title: C1 Fund Inc. Announces Form N-CSR Filing Update
data.description: C1 Fund Inc. (NYSE: CFND) based in Palo Alto, California, stated today that it is facing challenges in finalizing and submitting its Annual Report on Form N-CSR and sharing its annual report for the period ending December 31, 2025 within the designated timeframe due to significant obstacles and costs. The Fund has been informed by the New York Stock Exchange regarding the delayed submission, which currently has no direct impact on the listing of the Fund’s common stock on the NYSE.

data.title: Portland General Electric schedules earnings release and conference call for Friday, May 1
data.description: Portland General Electric Company (NYSE: POR), based in Portland, Oregon, revealed today its intention to hold an analyst conference call and webcast at 11 a.m. ET on Friday, May 1. This event aims to discuss the company's financial performance for the first quarter of 2026. This initiative reflects the company's commitment to transparency and stakeholder engagement.
Senior WH official: Trump has spent the day in the Oval Office and Oval Dining Room being briefed, ABC News.

data.title: CORRECTING and REPLACING ATL Medical Integrates OMNIVISION’s OVMed® OH0131 Image Signal Processor into Its PREVOYANCE® Medical Imaging System
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, and Springville, Utah, it has been announced that ISO 13585 has been corrected to ISO 13485 in the second paragraph of a press release issued on March 31, 2026. The updated release reveals that ATL Medical has incorporated Omnivision's OVMED® OH0131 Image Signal Processor into its Prevoyance® Medical Imaging System. The OVMed® ISP OH0131 is equipped with sophisticated image algorithms to enhance brightness, contrast, saturation, hue, and sharpness, as well as advanced noise reduction technology.
Senior White House Official: Trump's national Security team is gathered at the White House - ABC News

data.title: BEASLEY BROADCAST GROUP TO REPORT FY 2025 FINANCIAL RESULTS, HOST CONFERENCE CALL AND WEBCAST ON APRIL 8
data.description: In Naples, Florida, on April 3, 2026, Beasley Broadcast Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: BBGI), a prominent multi-platform media firm, revealed plans to release its financial results for the fiscal year 2025 on Wednesday, April 8, 2026, before the market opens.

data.title: ORIC Pharmaceuticals Reports Inducement Grants under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: In South San Francisco and San Diego, on April 3, 2026, ORIC Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: ORIC), a company concentrating on oncology treatments targeting therapeutic resistance mechanisms, revealed that on April 1, 2026, they provided a new non-executive employee, who joined in March 2026, with 80,000 non-qualified stock options and 15,000 restricted stock units.

data.title: AIOS Tech Inc. Announces Receipt of Nasdaq Notification Regarding Minimum Bid Price Deficiency
data.description: On April 1, 2026, AIOS Tech Inc. (NASDAQ: AIOS) disclosed that it had received correspondence from Nasdaq indicating that the company had failed to meet the sustained listing criteria under Nasdaq Listing Rules 5550(a)(2). This was due to the closing bid price of AIOS's Class A Common Shares falling below $1 per share over the past 30 consecutive business days. This notification implied that AIOS was not meeting the minimum bid price stipulated by Nasdaq for continued listing.

data.title: Midland States Bancorp, Inc. To Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results On Thursday, April 23
data.description: In Effingham, Illinois, on April 3, 2026, Midland States Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: MSBI) revealed plans to release its first quarter 2026 financial data on April 23, 2026, after the market closes. The announcement will include an investor presentation accessible on the Webcasts and Presentations page of the company's investor relations website.

data.title: Xilio Therapeutics Announces Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: In WALTHAM, Massachusetts, on April 03, 2026, Xilio Therapeutics, Inc. revealed that it granted non-qualified stock options to two new employees on April 1, 2026. The options enable the purchase of 3,257 shares of the company's common stock under Xilio Therapeutics’ 2022 Inducement Stock Incentive Plan. Xilio Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biotechnology firm focusing on developing masked immuno-oncology therapies for individuals battling cancer. The company trades on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol XLO.
